appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md: Background surface description changed from 'per-pixel noise' to 'Bayer 4×4 ordered dithering' (factual correction after fix-content-surface-gradient replaced PRNG noise with ordered dithering)
Updated architecture.md: Title bar description changed from 'Untitled' to 'Text/Image' to reflect context-dependent document names
Updated architecture.md: Font size references updated from 20px to 18px for both monospace and proportional font caches

Updated architecture.md Rendering Invariants: Added 'Dirty rects use pre-render state' constraint documenting that dirty rect computation must snapshot state before the render pass to avoid missed regions

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update test baseline from '921 tests must pass at all times (900 system + 21 prototype)' to '929 tests must pass at all times (908 system + 21 prototype)'. The count grew across the polish-feedback milestone as features added new tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features fix-icons-and-document-names (+3 tests), fix-content-surface-gradient (+5 tests), and fix-present-logging-and-font-size (renamed 1 test) brought the total from 921 to 929. Multiple reviewers flagged the stale count.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Workers must not commit unrelated formatting/reordering changes bundled with feature commits. If unstaged formatting changes from prior sessions exist in the working tree, either (a) commit them as a separate 'chore: formatting' commit before beginning feature work, or (b) use git stash to set them aside.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features fix-present-logging-and-font-size (663 ins/614 del for ~40 lines of actual change) and polish-demo-validation (1140 ins/969 del, all formatting) both committed large amounts of reformatting mixed with or attributed to their feature work. This pattern occurred across 3+ workers in the milestone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to os-worker skill's visual verification section: 'When debugging dirty-rect rendering bugs, temporarily set force_full=true to determine whether the issue is in content rendering or dirty rect computation. If the bug disappears with force_full=true, the dirty rect region is too small.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker on fix-clock-localtime-and-backspace used this technique to isolate the backspace ghost pixel bug's root cause. The technique is generally applicable to any dirty-rect rendering issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md rule 'When changing a constant value, search for ALL comments and docstrings referencing the old value and update them' has an ambiguous edge case for mutable variables (static mut LINE_H: u32 = 20) whose default is overwritten at runtime
rejectedObservations.reason: Edge case too narrow to warrant changing the rule. The current rule is clear for its intended purpose (constants and documentation). Runtime-overwritten defaults are a special case that workers can handle with judgment.
